meta.title: Tarik Hennen — AI trainer, founder of Cercle IA
meta.description: Tarik Hennen, former lawyer, AI practitioner since 2021. Founder of Cercle IA. He lectures at IHECS, trains at EPHEC and UCLouvain, and has trained 250+ professionals to use AI with method.
